subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Help the Reading Ranger complete the Write a Simple Sentence trail.
lesson.objective: I can practice write a simple sentence with careful listening, reading, or writing.
lesson.concept_explanation: This mission teaches write a simple sentence using child-friendly models and short practice steps. A complete sentence has a capital letter, spaces, an action or idea, and an end mark.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may answer from a first clue instead of checking the whole word, sentence, or story.
lesson.real_world_connection: Readers and writers use this skill in books, signs, notes, and classroom talk.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read or listen carefully, use the model, then choose or write the answer.
lesson.mini_lesson: First study the model. Then say the sounds or words slowly. Last, check that your answer matches the prompt.

worked_examples.text: Watch: Use the sentence_builder model, name the important part, then answer.
Demo: Try one with help before independent practice.

hint_ladder: Listen for the target sound or word part.
Check your answer with the model.

guided_practice.prompt: Fix the capital letter: the cat runs.
hints: Say the word slowly.
Listen for the target sound or word part.
Check your answer with the model.
guided_practice.explanation: The answer is The cat runs..

question_audio.text: Fix the capital letter: the cat runs.
question_audio.label: Read Question

hints: Say the word slowly.

guided_practice.feedback: Yes — I see a dog. fits.

story.text: Listen to this page. Today you will practice building a complete sentence in Skill World. This mission helps you read like a careful first grader. A sentence starts with a capital letter, has spaces between words, and ends with punctuation. Press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This page teaches building a complete sentence. Read the words and check capital letters, spaces, and punctuation. The sentence builder shows how words become a complete sentence. A sentence starts with a capital letter, has spaces between words, and ends with punctuation. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This page shows a worked example for Write a Simple Sentence. The sentence builder shows how words become a complete sentence. First, listen carefully to the model. Next, think about what the question is asking. Then compare the choices or words before deciding. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This page lets you try building a complete sentence with help. Read the words and check capital letters, spaces, and punctuation. If you feel unsure, use the model and say the sounds, word, or sentence again. A sentence starts with a capital letter, has spaces between words, and ends with punctuation. Press Next to continue.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: This practice page helps you use building a complete sentence on your own. The question may ask you to read, listen, choose, or write. A sentence starts with a capital letter, has spaces between words, and ends with punctuation. Press Read Question to hear the question, then choose your answer when you are ready.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: This challenge page gives you a little harder practice with building a complete sentence. Read or listen to the whole item before you answer. Use the card, sentence, passage, or picture as evidence. Press Read Question if you want to hear the question, then use the hint if you need help.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: This checkpoint page checks how well you can use building a complete sentence. Take your time and listen for the important clue. A sentence starts with a capital letter, has spaces between words, and ends with punctuation. Press Read Question to hear the item, answer carefully, then continue.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge page celebrates your work on building a complete sentence. Think about one sound, word, sentence, or story clue you used today. Good readers listen, look back, and try again when something is tricky. Press Next to see your profile.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page shows your Skill World progress. You practiced building a complete sentence and used reading strategies like listening, looking closely, and checking your answer. Keep practicing these skills in books and writing. You can go back to the hub when you are finished.
profile.label: Read This Page
